시편 141:1.content: Yahweh, I have called on you. Come to me quickly! Listen to my voice when I call to you.

시편 141:2.content: Let my prayer be set before you like incense; the lifting up of my hands like the evening sacrifice.

시편 141:3.content: Set a watch, Yahweh, before my mouth. Keep the door of my lips.

시편 141:4.content: Don’t incline my heart to any evil thing, to practice deeds of wickedness with men who work iniquity. Don’t let me eat of their delicacies.

시편 141:5.content: Let the righteous strike me, it is kindness; let him reprove me, it is like oil on the head; don’t let my head refuse it; Yet my prayer is always against evil deeds.

시편 141:6.content: Their judges are thrown down by the sides of the rock. They will hear my words, for they are well spoken.

시편 141:7.content: “As when one plows and breaks up the earth, our bones are scattered at the mouth of Sheol.”

시편 141:8.content: For my eyes are on you, Yahweh, the Lord. In you, I take refuge. Don’t leave my soul destitute.

시편 141:9.content: Keep me from the snare which they have laid for me, from the traps of the workers of iniquity.

시편 141:10.content: Let the wicked fall together into their own nets while I pass by.
